name: Check-in Grace Period
description: Employees checking in within X minutes of shift start are marked ON TIME.

name: Face Match Confidence Threshold
description: Events from cameras must have a confidence score above Y to be verified. Lower scores are flagged for manual review.

name: Auto-Checkout Timeout
description: If no EXIT event is recorded by end of shift + 4 hours, system auto-generates a presumed EXIT event based on last known presence.

name: Consecutive Absence Alert
description: Trigger medium severity alert to HR if employee is absent without leave for N consecutive days.

name: Device Offline Heartbeat
description: Device is marked Offline if ping is missed for M seconds.
